note: cost strategy picks the cheapest model

messages.content: Prove the pigeonhole principle and analyze a distributed system's failure modes.

note: pure cost must NOT upgrade hard prompts (regression guard)
quality must NOT overspend on a trivial prompt
any vision request must route to a vision model

content.text: Analyze this architecture diagram: critique the distributed system design, consistency trade-offs, and failure modes.

note: strongest vision model (only tier-5 vision) on a hard prompt

messages.content: Prove rigorously that the square root of 2 is irrational using proof by contradiction, and derive each step.

note: only reasoning-capable model wins hard reasoning under quality
no audio-capable model in catalog -> no eligible model
bypass uses the body model verbatim
bypass overrides even a cost strategy

content.text: Analyze this circuit schematic in depth: trace the signal path, identify race conditions and concurrency hazards, and propose an optimized architecture, deriving and justifying the trade-offs of each change.

note: flagship (tier-6) wins a hard vision+analysis prompt under quality

content.text: Analyze this data-flow diagram rigorously: assess correctness, concurrency hazards, and bottlenecks, then recommend a redesign and justify the trade-offs.

note: flagship on a second hard vision prompt, distinct from quality-vision-hard
